'''Nomad City''' was a mobile [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility owned by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. It was located on the small, mineral-rich [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]]. Nomad City was built from an old [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]], which was mounted on top of forty captured [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walkers. The [[City/Legends|city]] would constantly move to remain on Nkllon's night side.

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the forces of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] [[Raid on Nomad City|raided]] Nomad City to steal [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]] for the [[Battle of Sluis Van|attack]] on [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]]. Later on in his campaign, Thrawn sent three [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' Fleet]] Dreadnaughts to attack Nomad City in its subsequent [[Destruction of Nomad City|destruction]], and stole four months of valuable minerals. Nomad City was damaged, and no longer able to move. The workers were evacuated with the help of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], but he and Lando could not convince [[New Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] to lend a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to repair the facility. Nevertheless, Nomad City was repaired and rescued, only for Calrissian to lose it in a Sabacc game.
